div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:
This implementation guide is a FHIR IG rendering of the KBS Map Set from VA sources (primarily VistA) to FHIR. Where appropriate these maps conform to the us-core profiles.

title.value: US Veterans Administration FHIR Map Set Implementation Guide

description.value: This implementation guide is a FHIR IG rendering of the KBS Map Set from VA sources (primarily VistA) to FHIR. Where appropriate these maps conform to the us-core profiles.

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: The following artifacts define example CapabilityStatements that group profiles by project.
This StructureDefinition contains the Logical Model for the mapped parts of the source A LEAD IMPLANT (698.2)
This StructureDefinition contains the Logical Model for the mapped parts of the source ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE (430)
This StructureDefinition contains the Logical Model for the mapped parts of the source ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE TRANS.TYPE (430.3)
Extension account-statementGeneratedDay
Terminology Maps adminGender

VistA Source ValueSet for Terminology Maps adminGender

name.value: VA Adverse Drug Event Reporting System

description.value: This CapabilityStatement enumerates the profiles that the API should address, in the estimation of the enterprise mapping team. Some elements may not be appropriate for those cases; consult the actual API specification published by the API provider
